overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit urban streets. The player navigates covered walkways, crosses intersections, and passes through heavy traffic in a futuristic dystopian setting with towering buildings and vibrant holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: large circular neon sign becomes visible on right building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered urban corridor, passing parked vehicles on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with support pillars
large illuminated advertisements displaying animated content on building facade
tall residential structure with external balconies and air conditioning units
row of futuristic cars parked along the curb with glowing tail lights
spinning circular neon sign with concentric rings in pink and blue

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban walkway beneath an elevated highway. The player moves forward past parked vehicles on the left while neon billboards illuminate the left wall. A distinctive circular neon sign appears on the right building as the player advances through the corridor.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit intersection
begins crossing the street at zebra crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection alongside other pedestrians, moving from sidewalk to sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
large blue neon sign reading HOTEL on distant building
wide open space between buildings with visible sky above

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection. The scene transitions from mixed artificial lighting to direct sunlight. The player crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a vehicle passes through the intersection. A large hotel sign is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with multi-story parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive braided hair walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: large concrete parking garage with multiple levels and external air conditioning units
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters
stream of futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player walks along a sunlit sidewalk bordered by a multi-story parking structure on the right. Palm trees line the walkway while vehicles stream past on the left. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance as the player passes various pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: waiting at intersection as multiple vehicles pass through crosswalk
crossing the busy intersection while cars continue to pass nearby

agents.ego_description: navigating across the busy intersection, timing movement between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving through the intersection followed by other traffic

entered.detail: wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes and red painted curbs
tall pole with traffic signals and black and yellow striped base
massive screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and crosses a busy urban intersection with heavy traffic. Multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the crosswalk including a distinctive purple sports car. The scene features wide yellow-striped crosswalk markings and large digital billboards on surrounding buildings as the player navigates through the dense traffic flow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed urban corridor into the bright, bustling heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins within a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past parked vehicles and glowing neon billboards that cast artificial light across the walls. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the lighting shifts abruptly to direct sunlight while the player crosses a zebra-striped intersection toward a distant hotel sign. The scene then opens onto a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees and a multi-story parking structure, with the highway receding into the background as pedestrians pass by. Finally, the movement leads into a dense urban crossing characterized by wide yellow stripes and towering digital billboards, navigating through a heavy flow of futuristic traffic including a distinctive purple sports car.
